overall_verdict_verified_by: reviewer-renata (per-WP, profile-loaded, tests re-run) + WP07 behavioral two-ref verification
overall_verdict_rationale: All 7 WPs reviewer-approved (reviewer-renata, re-running tests + verifying squad invariants per WP). The keystone WP07 two-ref guard is non-vacuous and anti-mutant-verified (forcing SPEC back to the coord partition turns the planning-ref assertion red across all 3 write paths). FR-007 end-to-end (coord mission maps 100%, zero manual coord steps), FR-008 both refusal shapes, and the residue-ripple re-pins all confirmed. Broad-suite green modulo failures proven pre-existing at the spec-only base (auth/SaaS-logged-in env). Three adversarial squads (post-spec/plan/tasks) remediated the design before implementation. C-010 verdict set by the operator-delegated implement-review orchestrator on the reviewer basis (2026-06-24).
